name: GetNetworkName
title: GetNetworkName
syntax: long GetNetworkName(dword busType, dword channelNumber, char name[]);
description: Retrieves the name assigned in the Simulation Setup for a specific channel.

parameters.name: busType
parameters.description: Bus Type of the channel. The predefined enum BusType should be used for the value of this parameter.

parameters.name: channelNumer
parameters.description: Number of the channel for the specified bus. Channel numbering starts with 1.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Receives the name for the channel.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
